benefits.description: improved memory recall, vivid memory flooding, enhanced ability to form detailed memories, improved focus for creative work
enhanced sensory perception, heightened taste perception, selective attention similar to adrenaline-induced hyperfocus

side_effects.description: diminishing returns over time, effects seemed to slow down

protocol_notes: 1 mg daily early morning on empty stomach. Weekdays only with weekends off. Used for 2-4 weeks at a time, once tried 8-week cycle. Also has history with Benzedrine, Ritalin, Evekeo (Adderall alternative). Memory training techniques (Harry Lorraine methods) combined with modafinil for equation memorization. Started during grad school for creative/intensive projects. Reported no observable impairment to others; undetectable to casual observers or law enforcement.
